creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
----------

In reply to Satoshi Taoka who wrote:
 
 > I cannot get afbackup-3.0.4.tar.gz from MASTER_SITES=
 > ftp://ftp.zn.ruhr-uni-bochum.de/pub/linux/

Hi!

Sorry, but after such a long time the port is totally outdated!
However, I have not the time to make a port of the newest version.
It should be easy, biggest porblem in 3.0.4 was the generation of the 
packing list.

afbackup is a really powerfull backup tool. It would be very 
interesting to many people!

Perhaps you can get the newest version and make a new port based onto 
mine for 3.0.4!

Thanks and regards

Lars
